properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Kneel at the cross, Christ will meet you there, Come while He waits for you; List to His voice, Leave with Him your care And begin life anew.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Kneel at the cross, Leave ev'ry care; Kneel at the cross, Jesus will meet you there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Kneel at the cross, There is room for all Who would His glory share; Bliss there awaits, Harm can ne'er befall Those who are anchored there.

verse.name: v4
